name: zoominfo
description: Search companies and contacts, enrich leads, find similar companies and contacts, and get AI-ranked prospect recommendations with ZoomInfo.

interface.shortDescription: B2B intelligence for sales, prospecting, enrichment, and account research.
interface.longDescription: Use ZoomInfo's go-to-market intelligence in Codex to search companies and contacts, enrich leads and accounts, build targeted lists, map buying committees, prepare for meetings, research accounts, compare competitors, and identify recommended or similar prospects.
defaultPrompt: Help me prepare for a meeting with Apple's VP of Marketing this afternoon.
Find high-fit enterprise accounts showing intent for sales intelligence.
Score these inbound leads and tell me who to call first.
